✨ Hello, World! I'm Sandeep Kumar.
I'm a Front End Web Developer with a background in Education and a life-long dedication to learning.
I enjoy creating things that live on the internet and turning problems into beautiful designs.
I primarily focus on HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
I love web development.

Transitioning to web development has enabled me to continue my passion for learning and embrace my status as a forever student.
I love to work as part of a dynamic team and find the challenges that programming brings very exciting.

Check out my most recent project.

🖥️ I’m currently working on: 100 Days of Code
🌱 I’m currently studying: JavaScript
🔍 I’m looking to: transition into a Front End Web Development role
📬 How to reach me: instagram.com/sid_buoy
